title: impatiens minor
intro: Impatiens minor, also known as small balsam or patience in trouble, is a plant species belonging to the balsam family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Impatiens minor include reducing fever, relieving chest congestion, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions like eczema and acne. Traditionally, the plant's leaves and stems are used in herbal preparations, often combined with other herbs, to create teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
